summary: Comprehensive testing of Superfly Commerce website completed. Backend APIs (14/14 tests passed), Stripe checkout flow working, contact form working, newsletter (Beehiiv) working. Frontend loads correctly with all pages accessible. Minor issues found with Blog RSS feed (empty Substack feed) and language translation timing.

CRITICAL_BUG.issue: Contact form handleSubmit() does NOT call backend API /api/contact/submit - it only shows a toast and clears the form. User submissions are NOT being sent to harry@superflycommerce.com
CRITICAL_BUG.fix_required: Add fetch call to process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api/contact/submit in handleSubmit function

integration_issues.issue: Blog page shows no posts because Substack RSS feed (harry901.substack.com/feed) returns empty channel with no items
Translation takes several seconds to complete - shows 'Cargando...' loading state but hero text doesn't immediately update. Translation service appears to be working but slow.

issues: Team photo has transparent/checkered background visible at top - consider adding solid background color to container
Title 'Free TikTok ManagementFor 4 Months' missing space between 'Management' and 'For'

action_items: Blog RSS: The Substack feed (harry901.substack.com/feed) has no posts - user needs to publish posts on Substack for blog to display content
TikTok Offer: Fix title spacing - 'ManagementFor' should be 'Management For'
Team Photo: Consider adding solid background to team photo container to hide transparent checkered pattern
critical_code_review_comments: Contact form in Contact.jsx shows toast but doesn't actually call backend API - form submission only shows local toast without sending data to /api/contact/submit
Newsletter form in Newsletter.jsx correctly calls backend API and handles responses properly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working (Stripe, Beehiiv newsletter, contact form SMTP). Frontend pages all load correctly. Stripe checkout redirects to stripe.com successfully. Blog page empty due to no Substack posts. Language translation works but is slow (uses real-time translation service). Mobile responsive design working.

homepage.contact_form: PASS - Form submits with toast (but see code review)

navigation.header_links: PASS - Services, Team, Case Studies, Blog, Pricing all present

stripe_payments.all_10_services: PASS - All packages create checkout sessions

pages.team: PASS - 4 team members, values, mission statement
pages.blog: PARTIAL - Page loads but no posts (empty RSS feed)

features_tested.mobile: PASS - Responsive design, hamburger menu visible
